title: FXIFY Check website
description: FXIFY, based in the United Kingdom, was established in April 2023. It is a CFD firm offering Instant, 1 Step, 2 Steps and 3 Steps evaluation programs. Account sizes range from $15,000 to $400,000. Platforms supported include MT5, DXTrade, TradingView and MT4. FXIFY checks CID (computer ID) to prevent account management. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.
forbidden_strategies: Crypto Availability: No crypto on Forex-based accounts effective Dec 1

payout_policy.details: 1st Payout on demand (Standard/Classic/3-Phase). Lightning: 1st in 7 days then Bi-weekly. Instant: Bi-weekly (Standard) / 10 days (Lite).

firm_rules.copy_trading: Allowed between own FXIFY accounts. Allowed from external accounts to FXIFY (proof required). Third-party prohibited. Instant/Lightning: Prohibited.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: Allowed (except Instant/Lightning). Prohibited practices (HFT, Arbitrage) apply.
firm_rules.news_trading: Allowed generally. Instant/Lightning: Restricted 5 mins before/after high impact news.
firm_rules.weekend_holding: Allowed (except Instant/Lightning - closed Friday before market close).
forbidden_strategies: Crypto Availability: No crypto on Forex-based accounts effective Dec 1

seo_content:
FXIFY: UK-Based CFD Prop Firm Since 2023

FXIFY is a CFD prop trading firm based in the United Kingdom, established in April 2023. Despite being a relatively newer firm, FXIFY has quickly grown its presence by offering four evaluation types — Instant, 1-Phase, 2-Phase (Trailing), and 3-Phase — across a wide range of account sizes from $15,000 to $400,000. FXIFY uses Computer ID (CID) verification to prevent account management by third parties.

Account sizes run from $15,000 to $400,000. Sample pricing on the 2-Step Trailing and 1-Phase models: 400K at $2,360 (standard $2,950), 200K at $839.20 (standard $1,049), 100K at $439.20 (standard $549), 50K at $303.20 (standard $379), 1-Phase 25K at $159.20 (standard $199), 1-Phase 15K at $95.20 (standard $119). The 2-step Trailing drawdown model provides a different risk structure compared to the static drawdown offered by the 1-Phase program.

Four platforms are supported: DXTrade, MT4, MT5, and TradingView. Tradable instruments include FX, Metals, Indices, Stocks, and Other Commodities. Note that Crypto is no longer available on Forex-based accounts effective December 1, 2025. Leverage for FX is 1:50 on Instant and 1:30 on 1/2/3-Phase; Metals are 1:20 on Instant and 1:30 on challenge models; Indices are 1:15 on Instant and 1:10 on challenge models; Stocks are 1:2 across all programs.

The minimum payout is $50, processed within 3 business days. Standard and Classic programs offer the first payout on demand, then bi-weekly. The Lightning program starts payouts at 7 days, then bi-weekly. Instant accounts pay bi-weekly (Standard) or every 10 days (Lite). Payout methods include Bank Transfer, Crypto, and Riseworks. Payments are accepted via Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, Credit/Debit Card, and Crypto.

FXIFY is chosen by traders who want a UK-based firm with multiple evaluation structures, TradingView support, and a competitive minimum payout threshold. EAs are allowed on non-Instant and non-Lightning programs. Weekend holding is permitted on Standard, Classic, and 3-Phase programs. Instant and Lightning accounts have stricter rules: no EAs, no copy trading, positions closed before Friday market close, and news trading restricted 5 minutes before and after major events. Inactivity limit is 60 days.
